data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conversion linkage to orders and rewards.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the conversion linkage to orders and rewards, but the evidence provided does not confirm this linkage. While there are successful booking orders, there is no explicit evidence showing how these bookings are linked to rewards or how conversions are tracked in relation to orders. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary data to validate the requirement is missing.
gaps: No evidence of conversion linkage to orders and rewards.
